title: Checking into a Hotel

segments.text: Hello, I have a reservation under Smith.
Welcome. Could I see some ID, please?
Breakfast is served from seven to ten.

transcript: Hello, I have a reservation under Smith. Welcome. Could I see some ID, please? Here's my passport. Thank you. You're in room 412. Breakfast is served from seven to ten.

title: Irregular Past Tense — Fill in the blank

questions.prompt: They ____ (see) the new movie last night.
